revisedPrompt:
Generate exactly one PNG image: a 128x96 pixel game-development pixel-art asset sheet, 1 row x 1 column, single 128x96 frame.

Style/profile: crisp high-resolution 16-bit / SNES-style pixel art, low-resolution pixel clusters, no antialiasing blur, consistent palette, dark one-pixel outline where useful, top-left light source.

Canvas and background: exact sheet size 128x96px. Solid #FF00FF chroma-key magenta fills all empty space, no gradients. No grid lines, no cell separator lines, no frame border, no frame numbers, no labels, no text, no watermark. Leave clear solid magenta margin between the object and every canvas edge.

Subject: ONE Japanese watermill hut, suisha-goya, as a single coherent field-prop object. Bright mythical-Japan satoyama palette: deep matcha and moss greens, clear blue-green water, vermilion and white accents, soft warm sunlight. Draw a small wooden hut with a thick thatched roof, front-facing perfectly straight-on in STRICT FLAT FRONT ELEVATION, like a torii gate facing the camera. NO perspective, NO three-quarter angle, NO visible side walls, NO roof side planes.

Composition: fills most of the canvas with clean margins. The building should read as one authored object, not repeated tile stamps, though it may later be sliced into 16x16 engine tiles. Break the rectangular silhouette with roof overhangs, uneven eaves, chimney or small roof detail, trim, windows, door detail, varied wall and roof texture, subtle dirt and shadow.

Watermill details: a LARGE dark-wood water wheel mounted on the front of the hut, shown FACE-ON, with the full circular ring of paddles facing the viewer. Add a stone base and a little blue-green water trough at the bottom. Add a soft contact shadow along the base and a readable clean collision footprint.

Cleanliness: no detached fragments, no isolated pixel islands, no dust specks, no seam slivers, no leftover residue. Keep every visible pixel part attached to the main coherent object or contact shadow.

Avoid: not a western windmill. No Mario, Nintendo, Zelda, Final Fantasy, Pokemon, Dragon Quest, Secret of Mana, Okami, or Sakuna characters, logos, likenesses, or emblems. No samurai armor, no kabuto helmet, no ninja outfit, no two-sword daisho, no gun, no modern objects, no horror mood, no dark gloomy palette, no bird or companion creature, no letter emblems, no modern text, no watermark, no UI.
